zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Paynell於大約1098年出生在英國武斯特斯爾杜德利時，他的父親Fulk de Paynel39歲，母親Beatrix FitzWilliam29歲。他於大約1115年與Juilana Bampton ,heiress結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1165年在英國戴文巴普頓享年69歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Paynell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Pernel, Parnell (Old French Peronel(le)) from Latin Petronilla, a feminine pet form of the Latin personal name Petronius. Petronilla was the name of a supposed early Christian saint and martyr. This surname was also brought to Ireland from Cheshire in the 17th century, by a family who had been supporters of Cromwell's Parliamentarians during the English Civil War. Charles Stewart Parnell, who founded the Irish Parliamentary Party in 1882, was a descendant of this family. See also Pennell .

variants.name: Penn
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Penn (in Buckinghamshire and Staffordshire), both of which are named with Brittonic penn ‘head’, often used in hill-names.

English: topographic name or metonymic occupational name from Middle English pen(n) ‘enclosure, animal pen, fold’ (Old English penn), for someone who lived by or worked at a fold. Examples of this surname are formally difficult to distinguish from those in 1 above.
English: from a pet form of the female personal name Pernel, see Parnell .

variants.name: Pernell
meanings: English (Middlesex and Warwickshire): variant of   Parnell  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Pennell
meanings: metronym from the Middle English female personal name Pennel (an assimilated form of Parnell ).

habitational name from Penn Hall in Pensax (Worcestershire), or from either of two places called Penhill in Devon and Yorkshire, or possibly from Pendle in Lancashire. All of the placenames probably derive from British penn ‘head’ + Old English hyll ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Paynell was born about 1098, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, his father, Fulk de Paynel, was 39 and his mother, Beatrix FitzWilliam, was 29. He married Juilana Bampton ,heiress about 1115. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1165, in Bampton, Devon, England, at the age of 69.

Il a épousé Juilana Bampton ,heiress environ 1115. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1165, à Bampton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans.

Er hat um 1115 Juilana Bampton ,heiress geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1165 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Bampton, Devon, England.

ko.lifeSummary: William de Paynell(이)가 대략 1098년 영국 워스스터실르 드들리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk de Paynel(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Beatrix FitzWilliam(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1115년 Juilana Bampton ,heiress(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1165년 영국 데폰 바프턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Paynell родился около 1098 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Fulk de Paynel было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix FitzWilliam, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Juilana Bampton ,heiress около 1115 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1165 г. в местности бамптон, девон, Англия в возрасте 69 лет.
